mapper.sql: s.session_id, s.initiator_id, s.initiator_role, COALESCE(iu.real_name, iu.username) AS initiator_name, s.target_id, s.target_role, COALESCE(tu.real_name, tu.username, COALESCE(tmi.store_name, tu.real_name)) AS target_name, s.order_id, s.title, s.status, s.last_message, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM contact_msg m WHERE m.session_id = s.session_id ) AS message_count, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM contact_msg m WHERE m.session_id = s.session_id AND m.is_read = 0 ) AS unread_count, s.create_time, s.update_time
LEFT JOIN sys_user iu ON iu.user_id = s.initiator_id LEFT JOIN sys_user tu ON tu.user_id = s.target_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info tmi ON tmi.merchant_id = s.target_id AND s.target_role = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contact_session (initiator_id, initiator_role, target_id, target_role, order_id, title, status, last_message, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{initiatorId}, #{initiatorRole}, #{targetId}, #{targetRole}, #{orderId}, #{title}, 0, #{lastMessage}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO contact_msg (session_id, sender_id, sender_role, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{senderId}, #{senderRole}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM contact_session s
WHERE (s.initiator_id = #{userId} AND s.initiator_role = #{role}) OR (s.target_id = #{userId} AND s.target_role = #{role}) ORDER BY s.update_time DESC, s.session_id DESC

SELECT
FROM contact_session s
WHERE 1 = 1
AND s.target_role = #{targetRole}
AND ( s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR iu.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR iu.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tu.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tu.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(s.session_id AS CHAR) = #{keyword} )
ORDER BY FIELD(s.status, 0, 1, 2), s.update_time DESC, s.session_id DESC

SELECT
FROM contact_session s
WHERE s.session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.msg_id, m.session_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_role, COALESCE(su.real_name, su.username) AS sender_name, m.content, m.is_read, m.create_time FROM contact_msg m LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.user_id = m.sender_id WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY m.create_time ASC, m.msg_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE contact_session SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
UPDATE contact_session SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, update_time = NOW(), status = CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE status END WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
